basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 8 Project Engineer Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Project Engineer: 4 Year Undergraduate degree in Electronics/Electrical Engineering/ MSc in Applied Physics with 2-3 years of experience in Industry or in an equivalent R&D lab.

salary_details.details: Rs. 45,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month (commensurate with qualifications and experience) (5% increment every year)

selection_process: Short-listing based on online applications Test/Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Engineer positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Engineer posts at IIT Madras is 03-06-2026. Ensure you apply well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the Project Engineer position announced by IIT Madras in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a 4 Year Undergraduate degree in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or an MSc in Applied Physics to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 45,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month, with a 5% increment each year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Madras Project Engineer recruitment is strictly online. No other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for the Project Engineer positions at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve short-listing candidates based on their online applications, followed by a test and/or interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these Project Engineer positions?
faq.answer: The Project Engineer positions at IIT Madras are temporary in nature.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum experience required for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have 2-3 years of experience in Industry or in an equivalent R&D lab to be considered for the Project Engineer role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article, which directs you to the official IIT Madras careers page.
